calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Room 501A
Judge Pro Tem: James P. Green
Clerk: John Stokes
Reporter: Bob Balian

This cause of action was transferred from Room 218. Plaintiff Russell Young was present and
was represented by Ross M. Madden. Defendants Simon Bergelson and Alina Bergelson were present in pro per. The above parties stipulated to a settlement on the record. The terms were restitution of the premises located at 3820 Balboa St., S.F. 94121. The writ is stayed to January 31,2003. Plaintiff is to pay the defendants their secirity deposit plus interest
at 5% per year. Plaintiff will also pay the defendants $4,500.00 when the defendants sign the stipulation. There shall be a mutual release of all claims. The keys aer to be surrendered on or before Jan. 31,2003. If the defendants vacate in a timely manner and leave the premises in broom clean condition a dismissal with predjudice will be filed by Plaintiff. If not Plaintiff will file a judgment for back rent and damages. Rents of December 2002 and January 2003 totaling $2,100.00 are waived. There will be no further stays.
